issue_title: The concurrent agent streaming output is wrongly segmented: the responses from the same agent are displayed fragmentedly in alternating parts in the message area.
issue_body_preview:
### Self Checks

- [x] This is only for bug report, if you would like to ask a question, please head to [Discussions](https://github.com/orgs/xpert-ai/discussions/categories/general).
- [x] I have searched for existing issues [search for existing issues](https://github.com/xpert-ai/xpert/issues), in
test_description_zh: 在对话界面中触发并发多个 Agent 同时进行流式输出，观察消息区域中每个 Agent 的回复内容是否完整连续地显示在各自的消息块中。
expected_result_zh: 并发 Agent 流式输出时，同一个 Agent 的回复内容应完整、连续地显示在同一个消息区块中，不应出现不同 Agent 的回复内容交替穿插、碎片化分段显示的情况。
